title: Digital Signage Menu Definition
description: JSON schema for the digital signage menu templating engine. Defines layout, theming, and menu content for full-screen display rendering.

layout.description: Controls the overall screen layout, resolution scaling, title, and logo placement.

resolution.description: Display resolution. Content is authored at 1920x1080 and scaled: 1080=1.0x, 2k=1.5x, 4k=2.0x.

orientation.description: Screen orientation. Landscape is 1920x1080 base, portrait is 1080x1920 base.

background_color.description: CSS color value for the full-screen background.

x_spacer.description: Horizontal spacing in pixels between elements (at native 1080p scale).

y_spacer.description: Vertical spacing in pixels between elements (at native 1080p scale).

container.description: Controls how areas are arranged on screen.

columns.description: Number of columns for area layout. 1 = vertical stack, 2 = side by side.

title.description: The main title displayed at the top of the screen.

top_padding.description: Pixel offset from the top edge of the screen.

logo.description: An optional logo image displayed in a top corner.

src.description: Path or URL to the logo image.

x_align.description: Which corner the logo appears in.

top_padding.description: Pixel offset from the top edge.

max_height.description: Maximum height of the logo in pixels.

theme.description: Font and color definitions applied globally via CSS custom properties. All values can be overridden at runtime.

divider_color.description: CSS color for dividers between items.

area_background.description: CSS color for the background of each area block.

areas.description: The menu areas (sections) containing items to display.

title.description: Display title for this section. Optional — omit for untitled groups.

column_count.description: Number of columns for the item grid within this area.

name.description: Display name of the menu item.

description.description: Optional short description shown below the item name.

price.description: Single price for items without variations. Displayed as a dollar amount.

variations.description: Size or style variations with individual prices. When present, replaces the single price.

hide_if_empty.description: If true, hide this item when it has no price and no variations.

font.description: Font definition with family, weight, color, and size.

family.description: CSS font-family name. Google Fonts (Montserrat, Lato, Roboto, Open Sans, Oswald) are auto-loaded.
